title: Raw Material Procurement
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module explains the raw materials used in stainless steel manufacturing, their importance, procurement process, storage, inspection, and handling before steelmaking.
learningObjectives: Identify the raw materials used in stainless steel manufacturing.
Understand the purpose of each raw material.
Learn the procurement and inspection process.
Understand raw material storage and handling.
Recognize the importance of raw material quality.

content.introduction: The quality of stainless steel begins with the quality of its raw materials. Proper selection, inspection, storage, and handling of raw materials ensure efficient steelmaking and consistent product quality.
content.overview: Raw materials are procured from approved suppliers, inspected upon arrival, stored under controlled conditions, and supplied to the Scrap Yard and Steel Making Shop as per production requirements.

majorRawMaterials.name: Stainless Steel Scrap
majorRawMaterials.purpose: Primary metallic input used for melting.

majorRawMaterials.name: Ferro Molybdenum
majorRawMaterials.purpose: Enhances strength and resistance to corrosion.

majorRawMaterials.name: Dolomite
majorRawMaterials.purpose: Protects furnace lining and supports slag formation.

majorRawMaterials.name: Carbon Additives
majorRawMaterials.purpose: Used to adjust carbon content during steelmaking.

content.summary: High-quality raw materials are essential for producing premium stainless steel. Proper procurement, inspection, storage, and handling directly influence manufacturing efficiency and final product quality.
